formula:
=IF(OR($C$9="",$C$15="",$C$14=""),
   "",
   LET(
      material, TRIM($C$14),
      custom, TRIM($C$17),
      beam, VALUE(LEFT($C$9,FIND("x",$C$9)-1)),
      isSixSix, EXACT($C$9,"6x6"),
      rawList, IF(UPPER(material)="CEDAR",
                   Settings!$A$2:$A$5,
                   IF(UPPER(TRIM($C$15))="VERTICAL",
                      FILTER(Settings!$A$2:$A$5, Settings!$C$2:$C$5 <= beam),
                      FILTER(Settings!$A$2:$A$5, Settings!$B$2:$B$5 <= beam)
                   )
                ),
      baseList, IF(isSixSix,
                   FILTER(rawList, rawList<>"1x3"),
                   rawList
                ),
      cWidth, IF(custom<>"", VALUE(LEFT(custom,FIND("x",custom)-1)), ""),
      cDepth, IF(custom<>"", VALUE(MID(custom,FIND("x",custom)+1,99)), ""),
      addCustom, IF(custom<>"",
                    IF(UPPER(material)="CEDAR",
                       custom,
                       IF(UPPER(TRIM($C$15))="VERTICAL",
                          IF(cDepth <= beam, custom, ""),
                          IF(cWidth <= beam, custom, "")
                       )
                    ),
                    ""
                 ),
      VSTACK(baseList, addCustom)
   )
)

=IF($I$14="Cedar",
   LET(
      custom, TRIM($I$17),
      baseList, Settings!$A$2:$A$5,
      addCustom, IF(custom<>"", custom, ""),
      VSTACK(baseList, addCustom)
   ),
   IF(OR($C$9="", $I$15=""), "",
      LET(
         beam, VALUE(LEFT($C$9,FIND("x",$C$9)-1)),
         isSixSix, EXACT($C$9,"6x6"),
         sizes, Settings!$A$2:$A$5,
         rawFiltered,
            IF(UPPER(TRIM($I$15))="HORIZONTAL",
               FILTER(sizes, BYROW(sizes, LAMBDA(s, MIN(VALUE(LEFT(s,FIND("x",s)-1)), VALUE(MID(s,FIND("x",s)+1,99))) <= beam))),
               FILTER(sizes, BYROW(sizes, LAMBDA(s, MAX(VALUE(LEFT(s,FIND("x",s)-1)), VALUE(MID(s,FIND("x",s)+1,99))) <= beam)))
            ),
         filteredSizes, IF(isSixSix,
                           FILTER(rawFiltered, rawFiltered<>"1x3"),
                           rawFiltered
                        ),
         custom, TRIM($I$17),
         cWidth, IF(custom<>"", VALUE(LEFT(custom,FIND("x",custom)-1)), ""),
         cDepth, IF(custom<>"", VALUE(MID(custom,FIND("x",custom)+1,99)), ""),
         addCustom, IF(custom<>"",
                       IF(UPPER(TRIM($I$15))="HORIZONTAL",
                          IF(MIN(cWidth,cDepth) <= beam, custom, ""),
                          IF(MAX(cWidth,cDepth) <= beam, custom, "")
                       ),
                       ""
                    ),
         VSTACK(filteredSizes, addCustom)
      )
   )
)
=IF($C$17="","(leave blank if not needed)","(Custom Size Selected)")
=IF($I$17="","(leave blank if not needed)","(Custom Size Selected)")
=IF(TRIM(C17)<>"","Select tubing manually from the extra dropdown",IF($C$16="2x4",0.12,0.125))
=IF(TRIM(I17)<>"","Select tubing manually from the extra dropdown",IF($I$16="2x4",0.12,0.125))
